name: admin-handoff-intake
rationale: Inbound message matches admin-direction signal (subject pattern matching adminReply.js ADMIN_REPLY_SUBJECT_RE / ADMIN_FACING_SUBJECT_RE conventions). F3.AH intake classification routes to admin handler path; broker_initial_intent path is BYPASSED. Tests intake classification fork at admin-direction signal recognition.
notes: Single-event sequence. Reply-shape subject to mimic admin-direction signal pattern. Phase 4 spec note: this scenario will validate WHICH subject patterns trigger admin-route — the assertion should test the routing branch, not the regex itself.
